notes: Legacy scripts stay in place until the new pipeline reproduces or explains their outputs.
Intentional differences should be documented as bug fixes or convention changes.

scripts.role: Train NODE, FE, and MAML models from hardcoded scene splits.
audit_points: Move hardcoded platform/scene choices into config.
Use current Function Encoder package APIs for FE construction.

scripts.role: Launch repeated training runs over models/platforms/seeds.
audit_points: Should be replaced by config-driven sweeps over methods/platforms/seeds.

scripts.role: Streaming single-step error evaluation over full scenes.
audit_points: Hardcoded scenes, seeds, n_basis, hidden_size, inner_steps, and forgetting factor.
Outputs should become eval artifacts rather than plot-specific CSVs.

scripts.role: K-step lookahead evaluation with online adaptation.
audit_points: Preserve adaptation-state freezing within rollout windows unless intentionally changed.
Make body-frame rollout update explicit and tested.

scripts.role: Track FE-RLS coefficients through a sequential scene.
audit_points: Save coefficients and covariance diagnostics as eval artifacts.
Compare to batch/offline coefficients only when the comparison is mathematically meaningful.

scripts.role: Materialize train/test CSV files under data_split.
scripts.new_entrypoint: virtual split policies and optional materialized indices
audit_points: Record scene membership and index policies in manifests.
